allow: Bash(sed -i '' 's/    llm : BaseChatModel/    model : BaseChatModel/' orxhestra/agents/structured_output.py)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/def __init__\(self, llm: BaseChatModel/def __init__\(self, model: BaseChatModel/' orxhestra/agents/structured_output.py)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/def build_agent\(llm: BaseChatModel\)/def build_agent\(model: BaseChatModel\)/' examples/multi_provider.py)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/async def run_agent\(llm: BaseChatModel/async def run_agent\(model: BaseChatModel/' examples/multi_provider.py)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/    llm = ChatOpenAI\(/    model = ChatOpenAI\(/' examples/streaming_agent.py)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/async for chunk in llm\\.astream/async for chunk in model.astream/' orxhestra/agents/llm_agent.py)
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from orxhestra.cli.render import render_tool_call, render_tool_response, render_turn_summary, print_banner; print\('render.py OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from orxhestra.cli.ink_app import run_ink_app; print\('ink_app OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from orxhestra.cli.writer import InkWriter, ConsoleWriter; print\('writer OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from orxhestra.cli.app import main; print\('app OK'\)")
